actions.name: Hydration
actions.description: Effect: While Rainy Weather is active, the user is cured of 1 @Trait[major-affliction] or 1 @Trait[minor-affliction] at the end of their Activations, the oldest Afflictions being cured first. The user is considered Water Type for the effects of Rainy Weather.
